documentation.description:
Abstract :

Support for reading CSV (comma separated value) files. Also
supports other delimiters, including spaces.

tagged_types.name: File_Type
tagged_types.code: type File_Type is new Ada.Finalization.Limited_Controlled with private;

subprograms.name: Columns
subprograms.code: function Columns (File : in File_Type) return Integer

documentation.description: number of columns found or specified in Open

subprograms.name: End_Of_File
subprograms.code: function End_Of_File (File : in File_Type) return Boolean

documentation.description: True if Next_Row will raise End_Error; no more data.

subprograms.name: Gen_Read_Float

documentation.description: Allows integer or real number Ada syntax, and empty string returns 0.0.

subprograms.name: Gen_Read_Integer

documentation.description: Allows integer Ada syntax, and empty string returns 0.

subprograms.name: Is_Open
subprograms.code: function Is_Open (File : in File_Type) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Line
subprograms.code: function Line (File : in File_Type) return Ada.Text_IO.Positive_Count

subprograms.name: Name
subprograms.code: function Name (File : in File_Type) return String

documentation.description:
After Open, read will read first row (often containing the row
header names). Next_Row advances internal data so read will
read the next row.

If a quoted field crosses a line boundary, a row will consist of
multiple lines, with the quoted field containing ASCII.LF at the
line breaks.

Raises Ada.Text_IO.End_Error if there is no next row.

Raises Initialization_Error if new row is longer than
Max_Line_Size specified in Open.

subprograms.name: Open

documentation.description:
If Columns is 0, reads first row of the file to determine how
many columns there are, then resets file.

After any reset, skips Skip_Lines lines (for comments), then reads
the next row so it is current. Next_Row will read the following row.

Raises Initialization_Error if first row character count is
longer than Max_Row_Size.

Raises End_Error if there is no data in File.

subprograms.name: Quote
subprograms.code: function Quote (Item : in String) return String

documentation.description: Return quoted Item; handles embedded quotes using Ada syntax.

subprograms.name: Read
subprograms.code: function Read (File : in File_Type; Column : in Positive) return String

documentation.description:
Return the contents of Column as a string.

Raises Use_Error if Column is not in File.
Set File to reading first row.

subprograms.name: Row
subprograms.code: function Row (File : in File_Type) return Integer

documentation.description:
Current row.

This may differ from Text_IO.Line if some quoted fields cross line
boundaries.

subprograms.name: Unquote
subprograms.code: function Unquote (Item : in String) return String
